column1: 2004-01-04‎ The instrument of my resurrection was supposed to be freedom. But there isn’t an open sky or endless field to be found where I reside
column2: nor is there light or salvation to be discovered. Right about now I feel as low as I ever have. I don’t think it’s a big secret why
column3: really. My biggest disappointment and downfall came from what was supposed to be the one thing to lift me from the grave I’m continually digging for myself. Nah
column4: never. Only the worthy are saved
column6: but what I do know is I’m a retarded fuck for ever believing things would change for me. I’m starting to regret sticking around
column7: I should’ve taken the razor blade express last time around... Well
column9: man. Maybe they’ve got another shuttle comin’ around sometime soon? Ciao. Current Mood: drained Current Music: Strawberry Fields Forever - John Lennon

column2: so fucking naive. Always expecting change when I know nothing ever changes. I've seen mothers choose their man over their own flesh and blood
column3: I've seen others choose alocohol over friendship. I sacrifice no more for others
column4: part of me has fucking died and I hate this shit. I'm living every mans nightmare and that single fact alone is kicking my ass
column5: I really must be fucking worthless. This place never changes
column6: it never will. Fuck it all.
